cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out which statement is true based on the passage provided. Let me read through the passage again carefully to make sure I understand all the details. The passage starts by talking about the improvement in water supply quality in southern Beijing, mentioning an official from the Beijing Municipal Commission of Development and Reform, Zhao Lei. They upgraded three recycled water plants, increasing processing capacity by 160,000 cubic meters per day. There's a mention of speeding up sewage treatment plants to recycle sewage more. Then, a researcher from Nature University, Zhang Xiang, says that using recycled water is important, especially in water-scarce cities like Beijing, and that setting up more plants reduces costs because recycling is cheaper than transferring water over long distances. According to the Beijing Water Authority, they plan to set up 46 more recycled water plants and upgrade 20 sewage treatment plants in the next three years. By 2015, the treatment rate of domestic sewage in downtown Beijing will reach 98%. Also, the recycled water is mainly used for industry, landscaping, and cleaning.
